headline: Edwards Lifesciences to Present at the BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference
summary: IRVINE, Calif., April 28, 2026--Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE: EW) today announced it will participate in the BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference on Tuesday, May 12, 2026.
